summary: Applied the residual round-2 cleanup findings by removing the last board-local parser duplication, aligning existence checks to `stat`, and improving shared-module-loader error propagation.
highlights: Board parse wrappers now delegate to shared review-engine parsing helpers.
Board no longer carries local copies of preValidateResponse or cleanJsonResponse.
Board pathExists now uses stat instead of reading file contents.
shared-module-loader now surfaces import failures instead of masking them as missing modules.
